headlines.text: US Colonel rescued from Iranian mountains after daring CIA-backed operation on Day 37 of Iran war
Trump drops Easter Sunday f-bomb on Truth Social, threatens to bomb Iranian power plants and bridges by Tuesday
Iran claims it downed two US C-130s and two Black Hawks during the rescue mission
Iran attacks Kuwait power plants and UAE infrastructure; Qatar intercepts Iranian drones and missiles
Gas prices hit $4.10/gallon nationally, first time above $4 since 2022 thanks to Hormuz blockade
Super Mario Galaxy Movie dominates Easter box office with $370M global opening weekend
Artemis II astronauts preparing to loop around Moon's far side, 180,000 miles from Earth
Trump signs executive order limiting mail-in voting ahead of 2026 midterms
SpaceX files confidential IPO targeting $2 trillion valuation, potential largest listing in history
Zendaya and Robert Pattinson's A24 film The Drama opens to $14M despite mixed audience scores

breaking.text: US Colonel rescued from Iran after heavy firefight; Trump threatens power plants by Tuesday if Hormuz stays closed

stories.hed: US Rescues Downed F-15 Colonel From Iranian Mountains in Daring CIA-Backed Operation
stories.dek: A US colonel hid in a mountain crevice for over a day with a pistol and a beacon while hundreds of commandos, CIA deception ops, and two intentionally blown-up C-130s were deployed to bring him home. Trump called it one of the most daring rescue ops in US history, then immediately celebrated by threatening to level Iran's power grid by Tuesday.

stories.hed: Iran Strikes Kuwait Power Plants and Targets UAE, Qatar in Expanding Gulf War
stories.dek: Iran's IRGC fired drones and cruise missiles at Gulf Arab states Sunday, knocking out two Kuwaiti power generating units and sparking fires at petrochemical facilities. Qatar intercepted everything aimed at it, which is the kind of win you quietly celebrate while updating your bunker playlist.

stories.hed: Trump Signs Executive Order Restricting Mail-In Voting Ahead of 2026 Midterms
stories.dek: With midterm elections approaching, Trump signed an order tightening rules around mail-in ballots, arguing election integrity while critics call it voter suppression. Timing it during Easter weekend was a choice.

stories.hed: Artemis II Crew Prepares for Historic Lunar Far-Side Flyby, 180,000 Miles from Earth
stories.dek: Commander Reid Wiseman and crew aboard Artemis II are hours away from looping around the Moon's far side, the farthest humans have traveled from Earth since 1972. Good timing to leave the planet, honestly.

stories.hed: Trump Cursed Out Iran on Easter Sunday and Dems Say He Is 'Failing' Troops - Both Things Can Be True
stories.dek: Rep. Ro Khanna told NBC's Meet the Press that Trump is 'cursing out and threatening war crimes' while US service members are still under fire, despite the president claiming Iran's military is already destroyed. Iran's military, meanwhile, is destroying US aircraft and knocking out Gulf power grids, so somebody's math is off.

markets.context: Markets posted their first weekly gain since the Iran war began, but oil surged past $111/barrel on Hormuz fears, with WTI now trading above Brent in a historic inversion driven by supply crunch.

gas.note: For the first time since 2022, filling up your tank now costs more than a fancy latte - except you need the whole tank.

popCulture.hed: Super Mario Galaxy Movie Explodes to $370M Global Opening, Biggest Worldwide Debut Since Avatar: Fire and Ash
popCulture.dek: Mario, Luigi, Princess Peach, and now Rosalina (Brie Larson), Yoshi (Donald Glover), and Fox McCloud (Glen Powell) went to space and took the box office with them - $370.7M globally in its first five days. Critics were unimpressed; audiences gave it an A- CinemaScore, which is the cinematic equivalent of telling critics to touch grass.

genZ.definition: Trump's profanity-laced Easter Sunday Truth Social post demanding Iran reopen the Strait of Hormuz went instantly viral, spawning thousands of memes applying the phrase to everyday blocked situations. By noon Sunday it was trending across X, TikTok, and Instagram as a universal template for frustration with anything that won't budge.
genZ.usage: Gas station is out of regular and only has premium? Open the Fuckin Strait, Gary.

tldr: On Easter Sunday, the US rescued a downed Air Force colonel from Iranian mountains in a Hollywood-grade operation involving CIA deception and exploding C-130s, while Trump celebrated by threatening to bomb Iran's power grid by Tuesday. Meanwhile, Mario went to space and made $370 million, which is more than Iran's entire air force is currently worth.
